project.name: UFC Tactical Dashboard
project.description: Full-stack MMA tactical analysis platform with SQLite API, Three.js 3D recreation, biomechanics framework, and fighter comparison system

conventions.database: PostgreSQL when DATABASE_URL is set; otherwise SQLite via sql.js

rules: All innerHTML assignments must use escHtml() for API-sourced data
All API routes must be wrapped in apiHandler()
All database queries must use parameterized statements
Never commit tokens, passwords, or API keys
CSP header must be maintained in server.js
Biomechanics estimates must cite peer-reviewed sources
